case_record_identity: document_id (UUID); case_number carried by the CASE-<n> Registry synonym
note: CASE-437: the KB write/ingest client, owned by APP-KB-YAC and served from the running KB instance. A client MUST compare its schema_version against the instance manifest before writing and refuse on mismatch (no-skew guarantee). v2 (CASE-425): CASE_RECORD identity = document_id/UUID + CASE-<n> Registry synonym (identity_fields:[]); allocate-then-create + resolve-then-update. SESSION/JOURNEY_ENTRY/DOCUMENT keep their identity_fields (Mixed model, C7). The v2 client is backward-compatible with a still-v1 CASE_RECORD template, so it is safe to serve before the template flip.
